visual_summary: A sidebar component with submenus implemented as dropdowns, useful for navigation menus in larger applications where users need easy access to multiple categories.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready sidebar component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-06
Description: A sidebar component with submenus implemented as dropdowns, useful for navigation menus in larger applications where users need easy access to multiple categories.
Style: glassmorphism
Interactions: clickable, dropdown
Tags: sidebar, submenu, dropdown, navigation, categories, menus

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
